lines.text:
Swear I couldn't sleep a wink last night
[00:18.18] No point in turning off the lights
[00:21.99] Not the same without your head on my shoulders
[00:25.34] Growing pains, but I don't wanna get older
[00:28.54] Almost like we left it all on read
[00:31.46] Couple feelings never laid to rest
[00:34.51] Didn't know that the party was over
[00:37.85] And it's true that I need you here closer
[00:42.25] Burning photos
[00:45.53] Had to learn to let go
[00:48.48] I used to be
[00:52.62] 
[00:55.04] Somebody in another skin (another skin)
[00:59.59] I heard that you're happy without me
[01:04.52] And I hope it's true (I hope, I hope it's true)
[01:12.94] It kills me a little, that's okay
[01:17.58] 'Cause I'd die for you
[01:22.86] You know I'd still die for you
[01:28.24] 
[01:38.73] I hope you're getting everything you needed
[01:42.23] Found the puzzle piece and feel completed
[01:45.28] Just wanted you to know every reason
[01:48.75] Hope you really know that I mean that
[01:51.65] Couldn't see the forest from the trees
[01:57.67] Only time we speak is in my dreams
[02:06.52] Burning photos
[02:09.91] Had to learn to let go
[02:12.62] I used to be
[02:19.45] Somebody in another skin (another skin)
[02:24.06] I heard that you're happy without me
[02:28.92] And I hope it's true (I hope, I hope it's true)
[02:36.93] It kills me a little, that's okay
[02:41.83] 'Cause I'd die for you
[02:47.21] You know I'd still die for you
[02:50.58]
